notes: Machine-readable companion to docs/RUNTIME_STATUS.md. Reactivated jitRecall/workingMemory/toolAdvisories/captureToolFailures with strict signal gate. Legacy bootstrap hook remains off; plugin bootstrap bridge off until handler refactor.

learning_details.notes: Script and table exist, but the consolidated host scheduler does not run it and no active runtime consumer currently depends on it.

session_snapshots.notes: Useful for targeted analysis, but intentionally excluded from the daily+Sunday wrapper on this host.

trajectories.notes: Trajectory recording exists, but the surface is not scheduled on this host.

eidos.notes: Schema and CLI exist, but there is no active cron or runtime integration for EIDOS on this host.

live_capture.notes: Telemetry can still be inspected historically, but live capture is not part of the current production route.

working_memory.notes: Reactivated 2026-04-16 with Haiku 4.5, cap 600 chars, 8 events, 45s LLM cooldown.

jit_recall.notes: Reactivated 2026-04-16 with strict signal gate (imp>=7, sim>=0.72, stale>14d+zero-access), anti-dup vs prompt (0.6 overlap), recency decay 30d.

capture_tool_failures.notes: Reactivated 2026-04-16 writing to BrainX DB. Severity scaling from error-harvester patch 2026-04-14 still applies.

bootstrap_bridge.notes: Bootstrap bridge kept off until legacy handler is refactored to use bootstrapFiles array instead of writing workspace files. Planned for next session.

runtime_observability.notes: Added 2026-04-16: brainx_runtime_injections table + brainx runtime-report CLI. Scores referenced_count via keyword overlap in handleLlmOutput.
